prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 high-fashion fantasy portrait of an elegant young woman with dark charcoal black hair with electric cyan highlights, shown from the chest up in a dramatic three-quarter pose. Her face is mostly covered by a centered soft-edged rectangular privacy blur in warm beige and dark taupe tones, while her visible features include a delicate neck, ear, hand, and long slender fingers raised near her cheek. She wears an avant-garde black couture dress with a high ruffled collar, thin black ribbon ties, lace-like texture, and scattered metallic silver floral appliqués across the shoulder and bodice. On her head is an elaborate celestial floral headdress made of exactly 3 large matte gray-blue spherical ornaments, black feathers, black wire loops, netting, dark leaves, small turquoise flowers, silver-gray blossoms, and a small cluster of gold petals on the right side. Surround her with a dynamic abstract ink-splash halo: sweeping black circular brush strokes, splattered black paint, translucent white and gray bokeh orbs, delicate white twig lines, and glowing cyan-blue accents. The background should be bright but smoky and high contrast, with shallow depth of field, lens bokeh, and a dreamlike editorial photography look. Use a palette of cyan blue, black, silver, charcoal, white, and muted gold. Lighting is cinematic and backlit, creating sparkling highlights on the ornaments and floral details. Style: ultra-detailed photorealistic fashion editorial mixed with surreal ink art, glossy magazine quality, intricate textures, soft haze, no visible text, no watermark.
